23.kj: alike, at all (once), both, likewise, only, (al-) together, withal.

24.gl: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)
24.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
24.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

24.gl: to depress literally or figuratively, transitive or intransitive (in various applications, as follows)

24.dv: a primitive root (possibly rather identical with H6030 (עָנָה) through the idea of looking down or browbeating);

24.gl: vigor, literally (force, in a good or a bad sense) or figuratively (capacity, means, produce); also (from its hardiness) a large lizard
24.kj: ability, able, chameleon, force, fruits, might, power(-ful), strength, substance, wealth.
24.dv: or (Daniel 11:6) כּוֹחַ; from an unused root meaning to be firm;

24.gl: to dock off, i.e. curtail (transitive or intransitive, literal or figurative); especially to harvest (grass or grain)
24.kj: [idiom] at all, cut down, much discouraged, grieve, harvestman, lothe, mourn, reap(-er), (be, wax) short(-en, -er), straiten, trouble, vex.

24.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
24.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

25.gl: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)
25.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
25.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

25.gl: to ascend, intransitively (be high) or actively (mount); used in a great variety of senses, primary and secondary, literal and figurative
25.kj: arise (up), (cause to) ascend up, at once, break (the day) (up), bring (up), (cause to) burn, carry up, cast up, [phrase] shew, climb (up), (cause to, make to) come (up), cut off,
answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

25.gl: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
25.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'

25.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
25.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.

25.gl: properly, a revolution of time, i.e. an age or generation; also a dwelling

26.gl: a hand (the open one (indicating power, means, direction, etc.),
26.kj: ([phrase] be) able, [idiom] about, [phrase] armholes, at, axletree, because of, beside, border, [idiom] bounty, [phrase] broad, (broken-) handed, [idiom] by, charge, coast, [phrase
26.dv: a primitive word; in distinction from H3709 (כַּף), the closed one); used (as noun, adverb, etc.) in a great variety of applications, both literally a

26.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
26.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
26.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

26.gl: an action (good or bad); generally, a transaction; abstractly, activity; by implication, a product (specifically, a poem) or (generally) property
26.kj: act, art, [phrase] bakemeat, business, deed, do(-ing), labor, thing made, ware of making, occupation, thing offered, operation, possession, [idiom] well, (handy-, needle-, net-) wo

26.gl: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)
26.dv: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

26.gl: to set (literally or figuratively); intensively, to found; reflexively, to sit down together, i.e. settle, consult
26.kj: appoint, take counsel, establish, (lay the, lay for a) found(-ation), instruct, lay, ordain, set, [idiom] sure.

26.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
26.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
26.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

27.gl: to stand, in various relations (literal and figurative, intransitive and transitive)
27.kj: abide (behind), appoint, arise, cease, confirm, continue, dwell, be employed, endure, establish, leave, make, ordain, be (over), place, (be) present (self), raise up, remain, repai

27.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
27.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

27.gl: properly, to wander away, i.e. lose oneself; by implication to perish (causative, destroy)
27.kj: break, destroy(-uction), [phrase] not escape, fail, lose, (cause to, make) perish, spend, [idiom] and surely, take, be undone, [idiom] utterly, be void of, have no way to flee.

27.gl: properly, to slide by, i.e. (by implication) to hasten away, pass on, spring up, pierce or change
27.kj: abolish, alter, change, cut off, go on forward, grow up, be over, pass (away, on, through), renew, sprout, strike through.

27.gl: a covering, i.e. clothing; also treachery or pillage
27.kj: apparel, cloth(-es, ing), garment, lap, rag, raiment, robe, [idiom] very (treacherously), vesture, wardrobe.

27.gl: a garment (literally or figuratively); by implication (euphemistically) a wife
27.kj: apparel, clothed with, clothing, garment, raiment, vestment, vesture.

28.gl: to complete, in a good or a bad sense, literal, or figurative, transitive or intransitive
28.kj: accomplish, cease, be clean (pass-) ed, consume, have done, (come to an, have an, make an) end, fail, come to the full, be all gone, [idiom] be all here, be (make) perfect, be spen

28.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
28.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

28.gl: a year (as a revolution of time)
